summary_en: Use this if you want to show how you turn user signals and social-native intuition into channels, experiments, retention, and ROI.
summary_zh: 如果你想展示自己如何把用户信号和社媒原生直觉转成渠道策略、实验、留存和 ROI，这个测试最适合你。

summary_en: Use this if you want to show how well you direct agent work, turn ambiguity into specs, and push agents to real shipped outcomes.
summary_zh: 如果你想展示自己如何指挥 agent 干活、把模糊需求压成 spec，并把 agent 推到真正交付结果，这个测试最适合你。

summary_en: Use this if you want to show your AI product judgment, MVP boundary control, spec clarity, and ability to move messy work forward.
summary_zh: 如果你想展示自己的 AI 产品判断、MVP 边界感、spec 清晰度，以及推进复杂协作的能力，这个测试更适合你。

summary_en: Use this if you want to show your user empathy, response speed, operational reliability, and ability to turn feedback into product improvement.
summary_zh: 如果你想展示自己的用户同理心、响应速度、运营执行力，以及把反馈转成产品优化的能力，这个测试更适合你。
